title: sweech upgrade — migration runner for legacy installs
description: sweech upgrade command: update-wrappers + healShareTopology + sessions.db init + classify-providers + open dashboard once. Idempotent. _postinstall-heal extended to call upgrade silently. --dry-run + --json.

context.text: Implemented sweech upgrade migration runner with wrapper regeneration, share-topology heal/sweep, sessions.db init, provider reclassification, one-time dashboard open, dry-run/json output, and postinstall integration. Gates: focused Jest upgrade/postinstall tests, npx tsc --noEmit, npm run build:cli, built CLI dry-run JSON smoke.
